title: taraxacum cardinale
intro: Taraxacum cardinale, also known as the Welsh dandelion or red dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. This perennial plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cardinale include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Taraxacum cardinale can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules or ointments.
